---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What limitation are you running into?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Which part of the project does this touch?

- [ ] Simulation (C / LBM solver)
- [ ] Website (Next.js frontend)
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, deployment, build)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or screenshots.
